sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, data String, num UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Täglich grüßt das Murmeltier.', 10), (2, 'Hello, world!', 20), (3, '', 5), (4, NULL, 15);
SELECT id, substringUTF8(data, 1, num) AS substring_data, substringUTF8(data, -1) AS last_char FROM test_strings WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, substringUTF8(data, 1) || ' appended text' AS modified_data FROM test_strings WHERE num + 5 > 10;
SELECT id, substringUTF8(data, 1, 100) AS long_substring FROM test_strings WHERE length(data) > 0;
SELECT id, substringUTF8(data, -1) || (10 + num) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32, foreign_data String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_joins VALUES (1, 1, 'Join Example 1'), (2, 2, 'Join Example 2'), (3, 3, NULL);
SELECT ts.id, ts.data, substringUTF8(tj.foreign_data, 1, 5) FROM test_strings AS ts JOIN test_joins AS tj ON ts.id = tj.ref_id WHERE ts.data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, substringUTF8(data, (num - 1) * 2 + 1, 3) AS substr FROM test_strings GROUP BY substr HAVING cnt > 1;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count, substringUTF8(data, substringUTF8(data, 1, 5) + 1) AS results FROM test_strings ORDER BY results DESC;
